TextView.android:text: Good morning. Today is a fresh start.
We are learning your behavior. Complete one check-in to unlock personalized guidance.
Baseline building... A few more days of data will improve your guidance.
MindTrace has detected warning signals. Help is available.
MindTrace is watching the strongest live signals shaping your day.
Your personal coach is ready to help
Get context-aware advice, stress relief, and focus strategies based on your real-time usage and mood data.
Execute your daily routine without phone drift.
This step helps stabilize the next clean block.
Keep phone away during first work session
This step protects your early momentum.
This step reinforces your reflection loop.
Your strongest pattern insight will appear here.
The model will forecast tomorrow's risk here.
Protect tonight and tomorrow gets easier.
Reflect on the past 7 days. This powers your long-term trend analysis and wellness scoring.
This pattern usually cuts into tomorrow's focus.
This pattern gives distraction the first tap advantage.
Switching fragments attention and weakens momentum.
Staying in bed with the phone
This makes the first intentional action much harder.
A rough evening often raises tomorrow's friction.
Put your phone on focus mode for 30 minutes.
This reduces early distraction and protects your morning momentum.
If the day already feels heavy, open Support before the spiral builds.
